tasks.subject: Task 1: VariationDescriptor registry (single source of truth)
tasks.description: Single source of truth for ALL variation metadata: the canonical 33-slot order (M1-19 + 14 new; spherical/polar once), params/defaults/rest, name→slot + intra-slot maps. Variations.canonicalOrder becomes a re-export. Files: Sources/FlameKit/VariationDescriptor.swift; Test: Tests/FlameKitTests/VariationDescriptorTests.swift. Verify: swift test --filter VariationDescriptorTests. See plan Task 1.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Widen the genome model
tasks.description: Variation.parameters; Xform animate/padding/wind; Flame interpolation/interpolationType/paletteInterpolation/hueRotation; enums. Files: Genome.swift, AnimationTypes.swift, GenomeTests.swift. Verify: swift build && swift test --filter GenomeTests. See plan Task 2.

tasks.subject: Task 3: Parser + serializer for params & animation fields
tasks.description: Parse <var>_<param> attrs into parameters; parse/emit animation attrs; round-trip parametric genome. Pin: param-without-weight edge case (synthesize weight=0 Variation so params round-trip; serializer emits params regardless of weight); assert no param-prefix collisions (fan2_ vs fan_, rings2_ vs rings_). Files: Flam3Parser.swift, Flam3Serializer.swift, VariationDescriptor.swift(matchParamAttribute). Verify: swift test --filter ParserTests --filter SerializerTests. See plan Task 3.

tasks.subject: Task 4: Port 14 special-sauce variation formulas to CPU
tasks.description: 14 new CPU formulas in Variations.swift faithful to variations.c (round-2 VERIFIED: blob/curl/rectangles/rings/fan pinned from source — caught unfaithful examples). 4 ARE RNG-consuming (julian, juliascope, super_shape [unconditional draw], wedge_julia) -> special-cased in evaluate like julia. rings/fan ARE coefficient-dependent (read affine e,f) -> closure sig (p,w,params,ef), evaluate gains ef:, ChaosGame call site updated. Files: Variations.swift, ChaosGame.swift, VariationsTests.swift. Verify: swift test --filter VariationsTests. See plan Task 4.

tasks.subject: Task 5: GPUXform 33-slot canonical table + param channel + flat packer
tasks.description: VariationDescriptor.canonicalOrder (Task 1) is the 33-name authority; Variations.canonicalOrder becomes a re-export of it. Device layout = 6+6+3+33+33*8 = 312 floats = 1248 B; Swift packXforms→flat [Float] (NOT a [Float] struct field — byte-copy constraint); MSL mirror varWeights[33]+varParams[264]; ChaosGameMetal builds xform buf from flat array. Additivity = SHA-256 of 6 frozen Metal renders vs Tests/Goldens/m2_baseline_hashes.json (captured pre-change). Files: Variations.swift, MetalHost.swift, ChaosGameMetal.swift, Kernels.metal, ParamChannelParityTests.swift. Verify: swift test --filter EndToEndParityTests --filter ParamChannelParityTests. See plan Task 5.

tasks.subject: Task 6: Port 14 MSL variations + grow apply_xform_body to 33 slots
tasks.description: 14 NEW MSL v_<name>. apply_xform_body reads varWeights[0..<33], 33-line guarded chain. RNG-consuming (julian,juliascope,super_shape,wedge_julia) take thread IsaacState& rng, 1 draw each; coef-dependent (rings=x.e, fan=x.e,x.f). NO ssWeights/ssTags side-channel. Per-variation ≥38 dB/0.95 SSIM for all 16 + a multi-RNG-variation genome (julia+julian order gate). Files: Kernels.metal, MetalHost.swift, SpecialSauceParityTests.swift. Verify: swift test --filter SpecialSauceParityTests --filter EndToEndParityTests. See plan Task 6.

tasks.subject: Task 7: flam3 parity-oracle harness [USER GATE]
tasks.description: USER-ORDERED GATE. Build flam3 from source; Tools/flam3_oracle.sh + Flam3Oracle.swift (auto-skip F10); testing.md (30/38 dB split). Verify: which flam3-genome && swift test --filter Flam3OracleSmoke. See plan Task 7.

tasks.subject: Task 8: smoother(t) + stagger coefficient
tasks.description: smoother(t)=3t²−2t³ + get_stagger_coef (ncp==2/stagger>0/non-final only). Files: BlendMath.swift, BlendMathTests.swift. Verify: swift test --filter BlendMathTests. See plan Task 8.

tasks.subject: Task 9: HSV/RGB palette blend + hueRotation interp
tasks.description: hsv_circular + rgb palette blend + linear hueRotation. Files: PaletteBlend.swift, PaletteBlendTests.swift. Verify: swift test --filter PaletteBlendTests. See plan Task 9.

tasks.subject: Task 10: GenomeInterpolator rewrite (.linear + .log)
tasks.description: Type-switched interpolator; .log polar+wind-unwrap+det-guard+post-identity+union/param-carry merge; .linear shim REUSES legacy mergeVariations byte-for-byte (keeps M1/M2 green — do NOT route .linear through the new merge). Files: GenomeInterpolator.swift, Interpolation.swift, InterpolationTests.swift. Verify: swift test --filter InterpolationTests. See plan Task 10.

tasks.subject: Task 11: Special-sauce padding (flam3_align)
tasks.description: Pad to equal counts, copy parametric params from neighbour, Group A/B/C rest + swap-affine. Files: SpecialSauce.swift, SpecialSauceTests.swift. Verify: swift test --filter SpecialSauceTests. See plan Task 11.

tasks.subject: Task 12: establish_asymmetric_refangles (wind[col])
tasks.description: Writes only wind[col]; symmetric-side column angle +2π; anchors log unwrap. Files: RefAngles.swift, RefAnglesTests.swift. Verify: swift test --filter RefAnglesTests. See plan Task 12.

tasks.subject: Task 13: Loop.blend (sheep_loop)
tasks.description: Pure R(θ)·M rotation of 2×2, animate gate, final skip, padding-under-log. Seamless gate = ‖frame(0)-frame(1)‖<1e-12 per-coef + rendered PSNR≥38dB (NOT byte-equal: R(2π)≠I in FP; flam3 doesn't reduce θ mod 2π). Files: Loop.swift, LoopTests.swift. Verify: swift test --filter LoopTests. See plan Task 13.

tasks.subject: Task 14: Transition.blend (sheep_edge)
tasks.description: Orchestrate align→refangles→rotate both→log interp+HSV palette; continuity ‖Δ‖<1e-3; finite on mismatched pair. Files: Transition.swift, TransitionTests.swift. Verify: swift test --filter TransitionTests. See plan Task 14.

tasks.subject: Task 15: PairSelector (Sequential) + Schedule
tasks.description: PairSelector protocol + Sequential; pure two-level-seek Schedule; alternation invariant. Frame-count PINNED: blend=(local+1)/N ∈(0,1] (1-indexed, flam3 convention; blend=0 never emitted); total PNGs = segments*N, no boundary duplicate. Files: PairSelector.swift, Schedule.swift, ScheduleTests.swift. Verify: swift test --filter ScheduleTests. See plan Task 15.

tasks.subject: Task 16: FeatureVector + SimilarityExploration (F1)
tasks.description: Sorted-array feature vector; ε-greedy selector; F1 cross-process bit-identical-across-N-launches via hidden `emberweft _feature-score` subcommand + committed Tests/FlameKitTests/Fixtures/similarity_pair/ + Process-spawn test; SimilarityExploration takes in-memory FeatureVectors (NOT Task-17 cache); exploration guard over a SYNTHETIC 20-sheep library (NOT the 47k archive). Files: FeatureVector.swift, PairSelector.swift, EmberweftCLI(_feature-score), SimilarityTests.swift. Verify: swift test --filter SimilarityTests. See plan Task 16.

tasks.subject: Task 17: Feature-vector cache (F5)
tasks.description: genomes/.feature_cache/ sorted-array records; incremental rebuild by mtime; --rebuild-cache; absent-cache+similarity error; make target. Files: FeatureCache.swift, FeatureCacheTests.swift. Verify: swift test --filter FeatureCacheTests. See plan Task 17.

tasks.subject: Task 18: emberweft animate CLI + manifest.json
tasks.description: animate → exactly segments*N PNGs + manifest (F9 schema; null-on-loop; top-level stagger; blend∈(0,1]); frames array built by global-index iteration NEVER Set/Dict (F1); G2 byte-determinism across runs (CPU single-threaded; Metal per existing repeat-run determinism); ≥2-sheep guard; snapshot. Files: Manifest.swift, AnimateCommand.swift, CLI.swift, AnimateCommandTests.swift. Verify: swift test --filter AnimateCommandTests. See plan Task 18.

tasks.subject: Task 19: Animated-frame parity/continuity/determinism suite
tasks.description: S6 gate: vs-flam3 ≥30 (skip), mismatched-transition Metal↔CPU ≥38, consecutive ≥40, G2 byte-identical, finite. Files: AnimationParityTests.swift, AnimatedFrameParityTests.swift. Verify: swift test --filter AnimationParityTests --filter AnimatedFrameParityTests. See plan Task 19.

tasks.subject: Task 20: PlaybackDispatcher actor + FlamePlayerTests target
tasks.description: Step 0 adds the FlamePlayerTests test target to Package.swift (does not exist today; Tasks 20-23 depend on it). Actor driving Schedule→MetalRenderer at target fps, triple-buffered, prefetch; no transition freeze. Files: Package.swift, PlaybackDispatcher.swift, PlaybackDispatcherTests.swift. Verify: swift test --filter PlaybackDispatcherTests. See plan Task 20.

tasks.subject: Task 21: Adaptive-quality controller
tasks.description: Pure (fps,thermal,budget)→budget with hysteresis; critical-thermal floor; clamped; deterministic-logic gate. Test lives in FlamePlayerTests (created by Task 20). Files: AdaptiveQualityController.swift, AdaptiveQualityControllerTests.swift. Verify: swift test --filter AdaptiveQualityControllerTests. See plan Task 21.

tasks.subject: Task 22: FlameUI (CAMetalLayer wrapper)
tasks.description: @MainActor NSView + CAMetalLayer hosting dispatcher textures; one-frame headless smoke. Files: FlameUI.swift, FlameUITests.swift. Verify: swift test --filter FlameUITests. See plan Task 22.

tasks.subject: Task 23: Realtime capability proof [USER GATE]
tasks.description: USER-ORDERED GATE. ≥58 fps median sustained over 30s @1080p nominal thermal; EMBERWEFT_PERF=1; testing.md split (M3 owns / M4 deferred). Files: RealtimeCapabilityTests.swift, testing.md. Verify: EMBERWEFT_PERF=1 swift test --filter RealtimeCapabilityTests. See plan Task 23.

tasks.subject: Task 24: Documentation sweep + flip M3 to complete
tasks.description: Correct loop/palette wording; promote transitions; add parity layer+oracle to testing.md; FlameUI/PlaybackDispatcher to architecture.md; roadmap M3 ✅; CHANGELOG M3 entry. Files: transitions.md, playback-modes.md, roadmap.md, architecture.md, CLAUDE.md(verify), CHANGELOG.md. Verify: grep -rn 'circular palette' docs/. See plan Task 24.

_reviewNotes: v2 (round 1): Task 5/6 GPUXform scheme rewritten (35→33 canonical slots; flat-pack [Float] not struct [Float] field; baseline-hash additivity proof). Task 10 split merge (.linear legacy / .log union). Task 16 cross-process test pinned (hidden _feature-score subcommand). Task 20 adds explicit FlamePlayerTests Package.swift step. Task 3 param-without-weight + prefix-collision edges pinned. v3 (round 2): Task 4/6 headline fix — VERIFIED vs scottdraves/flam3 variations.c that 4 of the 16 ARE RNG-consuming (julian, juliascope, super_shape [unconditional], wedge_julia) and rings/fan ARE coefficient-dependent (read affine e,f); spec line 'none consumes ISAAC' is FALSE. Task 4 example formulas were unfaithful (blob 2×/swapped, curl fabricated, rectangles 2×, rings fabricated, fan placeholder) — all replaced with source-pinned bodies + tests recomputed from C. Task 13/19 seamlessness corrected (R(2π)≠I in FP; not byte-equal; tolerance + rendered PSNR gate; flam3 doesn't reduce θ mod 2π). Task 15 frame-count pinned (1-indexed blend=(local+1)/N∈(0,1]; total=segments*N; no boundary dup). Task 16 exploration over synthetic 20-sheep library (not 47k archive); FeatureVector direct (no Task-17 cache dep). Task 10 det guard concrete (abs(det)<1e-12 → whole-xform linear fallback). Task 18 PNG count + F1 stable emit order. Task 20 Swift-6 actor↔MainActor crossing soundness.
